_comment: Slice-groove listening aid: drum material, MARKER mode (the render CSV's a_slices/b_slices column shows the live marker count; it must sit well above kMinSlices = 4 here, which is what makes this the counterpart to sampler_slice_field.json's grid fallback). Record 1-9s, STEP from 10s. MOTION on a sampler deck is driven by MOD (set_depth), not the LANE_MOTION base (see part.cpp sampler MOTION note) -- opens 14/22/30, ordered slice-walk first, disordered chop-kit last. That opening order needs BOTH: set_depth 0 and LANE_MOTION pinned to 0 and made inactive in init, the way sampler_solo.json does it. Part's default base for that lane is 0.5, so until 2026-07-23 -- when this scenario set only set_depth -- the headline loop-fidelity section played half-scrambled and this comment was false. COLOR to maximum from 26s opens FEEL -- the depth to which each grain inherits its own source transient's attack strength -- to full, so the second half of the render should show the loop's dynamics tracking the recorded material's own transients.
